zh.Caldecote, Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Engla: 英國瓦維其可爾卡爾德可特
zh.Northumberland, England: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: William de Herle是Robert De Harle的兒子，於1269年出生在英國瓦維其可爾卡爾德可特。他於大約1295年與Katherine de Beauchamp在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1315年被列為king's serjeant-at-law。他去世於1347年3月26日在英國諾圖波藍德卡素享年78歲。

zh-hans.Caldecote, Nuneaton, Warwickshire, Engla: 英国瓦維其可爾卡爾德可特
zh-hans.Northumberland, England: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William de Herle是Robert De Harle的儿子，于1269年出生在英国瓦維其可爾卡爾德可特。他于大约1295年与Katherine de Beauchamp在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1315年被列为king's serjeant-at-law。他去世于1347年3月26日在英国諾圖波藍德卡素享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Herle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Hannelore, Kurt.
South German and Swiss German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with ēra ‘honor’.

variants.name: Ehrler
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alfons, Kurt, Theodor.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: William de Herle was born in 1269, in Caldecote, Warwickshire, England as the son of Robert De Harle. He married Katherine de Beauchamp about 1295, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1315, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as king's serjeant-at-law. He died on 26 March 1347, in Castle, Northumberland, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: William de Herle est né en 1269, à Caldecote, Warwickshire, Angleterre, fils de Robert De Harle. Il a épousé Katherine de Beauchamp environ 1295, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1315, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est king's serjeant-at-law. Il est décédé le 26 mars 1347, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William de Herle wurde 1269 in Caldecote, Warwickshire, England, als Sohn von Robert De Harle geboren. Er hat um 1295 in England Katherine de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1315, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als king's serjeant-at-law aufgeführt. Er starb am 26. März 1347 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Castle, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: William de Herle è nato il nel 1269 nel Caldecote, Warwickshire, England come figlio di Robert De Harle. Lui sposato Katherine de Beauchamp circa 1295, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1315, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come king's serjeant-at-law. Morì il 26 marzo 1347, nel Castle, Northumberland, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Herleは1269年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアカルデコトでRobert De Harleの息子として生まれた。約1295年にイギリスでKatherine de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1315年，46歳の時，職業はking's serjeant-at-lawと記録されている。彼は1347年3月26日にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Herle(은)는 1269년 영국 워윅실르 캘데컷에서 Robert De Harle의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1295년 영국에서 Katherine de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1315년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 king's serjeant-at-law이었다. 그는 1347년 3월 26일 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Northumberland, England: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: William de Herle nasceu em 1269, em Caldecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra filho de Robert De Harle. Ele casou-se com Katherine de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1295, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1315, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como king's serjeant-at-law. Ele faleceu em 26 de março de 1347, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William de Herle родился в 1269 г. в местности калдекот, варвиккшир, Англия. Его отца звали Robert De Harle. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine de Beauchamp около 1295 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1315 году, в возрасте 46 лет,  он работал по профессии king's serjeant-at-law. Он умер 26 марта 1347 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William de Herle nació en 1269, en Caldecote, Warwickshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert De Harle. Se casó con Katherine de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1295, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1315, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era king's serjeant-at-law. Murió el 26 de marzo de 1347, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
